creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
There were little bugs in the patch.
a) the compatibility mode with USE_TCL_BUILD needs TCL_NO_RUN_DEPENDS set
  (analogy: USE_TK_BUILD and TK_NO_RUN_DEPENDS)
b) USE_TCL => _USE_TCL in a case (was reported as recursive)
c) added TCL_HAS_THREADS for ports to detect if a threaded version is
installed (or wanted to be installed) ->
this enables port maintainers to add --enable-threads to their
CONFIGURE_ARGS etc.

Fix: see attachment.
